findings.title: MCP server exposes all tools to any connected client
File read tool allows arbitrary path access
findings.recommendation: Restrict file operations to configured base directories

findings.title: MCP stdio transport has no authentication layer
findings.recommendation: Add token-based auth or mTLS for MCP connections

findings.title: Tool execution runs in server process without isolation
findings.recommendation: Execute tool calls in sandboxed subprocess with resource limits

findings.title: Server runs with full user permissions
findings.recommendation: Drop privileges and run with minimal filesystem access

findings.title: UV dependencies not hash-locked
findings.recommendation: Add hash verification to uv.lock entries

findings.title: Context cache writable by any connected agent
findings.recommendation: Add write authorization checks on context mutations

findings.title: No client identity verification on connection
findings.recommendation: Require client certificate or passport for MCP connection

findings.title: No audit log for tool invocations
findings.recommendation: Log all tool calls with client ID, timestamp, and parameters

findings.title: No concurrent request limits
findings.recommendation: Add connection pooling and per-client rate limits
